violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The lid located on the ice machine was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the area behind the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. NFCS must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The overflow drainage from the grease trap is draining into a bucket. Waste water must drain down the drain. Establishment is to service grease trap so that it is properly functioning. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The outside dumpster area was observed with an excess of litter, and trash. Outside dumpster areas must be maintained. Establishment cleaned area during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The tile floor behind the ice machine and in the back prep area was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The condensate from the Walk in Freezer refrigeration unit was observed frozen in excess on the walls of the freezer. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
